title: Fix Galactus and Jhaddu avatar serving

log.context: Fix Galactus and Jhaddu avatar serving

Both avatars are now cached (`HIT`) and serving correctly through Cloudflare with the correct byte count (3686 and 4022 bytes respectively).

The root cause was **stale/expired Cloudflare cache** — the avatar files were newly added (timestamps show `07:20` and `07:23` today) but the Cloudflare cache had an `EXPIRED` entry. The first request after expiry would re-prime the cache; the files just needed a warm-up request. Both are now cached and will serve with `HIT` status for the next 4 hours (`m...(truncated)
